caladaptaer 0.2.0

  • Guides and home

caladaptaer: Access Cal-Adapt Climate Data from R

Source: R/caladaptaer-package.R
caladaptaer-package.Rd

Provides native R access to the Cal-Adapt Analytics Engine, California's repository of downscaled CMIP6 climate projections. Supports both WRF dynamically downscaled (hourly, 3/9/45 km) and LOCA2-Hybrid statistically downscaled (daily, 3 km) datasets. Reads cloud-optimized Zarr stores directly from AWS S3 via GDAL, with no Python dependency.

Native R access to the Cal-Adapt Analytics Engine, California's repository of downscaled CMIP6 climate projections. Reads WRF dynamically downscaled and LOCA2-Hybrid statistically downscaled data directly from AWS S3 Zarr stores via GDAL.

Catalog functions

  • cae_catalog – load the data catalog

  • cae_models – list available GCMs

  • cae_scenarios – list available SSPs

  • cae_variables – list available variables

  • cae_search – search the catalog

Data access functions

  • cae_fetch – fetch gridded data as stars object

  • cae_fetch_point – extract time series at a point

Export functions

  • cae_write_cf_netcdf – write CF-standard NetCDF

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/lebauerapproach/caladaptaer

  • https://lebauerapproach.github.io/caladaptaer

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/lebauerapproach/caladaptaer/issues
